description: Feature queue M.E.R.L.I.N. — Sprint 2 active. S3-LLM-ROBUSTNESS test complete: HIGH bug BUG-FACTIONS-STALE-OMNISCIENT found + 2 LOW bugs. BUG-FACTIONS-STALE-FIX added at P5. Completed tasks moved to archive.

sprints.S2: CONTENU & SYSTEMES — 8 biomes, 45 verbes, MOS, dead code, integration audit
sprints.S3: POLISH & EDGE CASES — Stabilite, robustesse LLM

tasks.title: Fix stale run.factions: propagate meta.faction_rep to AI context
tasks.description: HIGH bug from S3-LLM-ROBUSTNESS: run.factions always zeros (never updated). Faction rep is in meta.faction_rep. Fix: (1) In context_builder.build_full_context(game_state): change 'factions': run.get('factions', {}) to 'factions': meta.get('faction_rep', {'druides':50.0,'anciens':50.0,'korrigans':50.0,'niamh':50.0,'ankou':50.0}). (2) In merlin_omniscient._build_event_context(game_state): same fix — replace run.get('factions',{}) with meta.get('faction_rep', {...defaults...}). (3) _get_dominant_faction() call at line 514 will now get real values. PAT-010: grep callers before edit. Also check evaluate_balance_heuristic context paths: game_master reads context.get('factions', {}) — for card-system path this is fine (absent = defaults 50.0); for omniscient path this fix propagates real data. DO NOT touch merlin_card_system._build_llm_context() (it correctly uses faction_rep key directly). After fix: NPC dialogue, event routing, event_category_selector, event_adapter faction conditions will all work correctly.

tasks.title: Corriger intervals biomes + conditions arcs (bible v2.4 s.3.6 + s.4.3)
tasks.description: S2-INTEGRATION audit found 2 MEDIUM bugs in BIOMES dict: (1) BUG-BIOME-INTERVALS: card_interval_range_min/max wrong for 7/8 biomes vs bible s.4.3. Correct values: landes(8-10), cotes_sauvages(6-8), villages_celtes(8-10), cercles_pierres(10-12), marais_korrigans(4-6), collines_dolmens(10-12), iles_mystiques(3-15). (2) BUG-BIOME-ARCS: arc names, arc_cards, arc_condition_faction, arc_condition_value wrong for landes/cotes/villages/cercles/marais/collines/iles vs bible s.3.6. Correct per bible: cotes=niamh:30 (not korrigans:20), iles=ankou:50 (not niamh:60), marais=korrigans:40 (not 50), etc. Also: Phase 1B+1C original spec still applies — add any missing BIOME_MATURITY_THRESHOLDS, MATURITY_WEIGHTS if absent.

tasks.title: Verifier ACTION_VERBS + MOS config + Trust tiers (deja partiellement en place)
tasks.description: Phase 1D+1F: Audit ACTION_VERBS (8 champs + neutre), FIELD_MINIGAMES mapping, MOS_CONVERGENCE, TRUST_TIERS, TRUST_DELTAS, IN_GAME_PERIODS — tous semblent deja en place d'apres S2-INTEGRATION audit. Verifier completude vs bible v2.4 s.6.1-6.4. Si deja complet, marquer completed apres verification.

tasks.title: Clean merlin_card_system.gd (GAUGES, bestiole)
tasks.description: Supprimer GAUGES const, gauge init, _get_critical_gauges(), gauge effects, bestiole context, _get_bestiole_modifier(). Audit avant suppression (PAT-009: verifier callers avant delete).

tasks.title: Supprimer 5 dead files (bestiole, souffle HUD, D20)
tasks.description: Supprimer entierement les fichiers de systemes morts. Verifier existence avant suppression. Verifier callers avec grep avant delete (PAT-009/010).

tasks.title: Fix reputation_changed signal: emit actual clamped delta not raw delta
tasks.description: S3-EDGE-CASES found LOW bug: _apply_effect ADD_REPUTATION branch calls reputation_changed.emit(faction, new_val, float(rep_delta)) where rep_delta is the raw unclamped input. At faction_rep=95 and delta=+20, actual change is +5 but signal emits +20. Fix: read current faction value BEFORE calling _apply_faction_reputation, compute actual_delta = new_val - old_val, emit actual_delta. File: scripts/merlin/merlin_store.gd, _apply_effect() match branch ADD_REPUTATION.

tasks.title: Ambiance dynamique biome: variation saison + heure de journee
tasks.description: Director decision q-20260412-002: ambiance doit changer selon saison (spring/summer/autumn/winter) ET heure de journee (aube/midi/crepuscule/nuit). La saison est deja dans run['season'] (via init_calendar_context). Ajouter 'time_of_day' au run state (calculer depuis Time.get_time_dict_from_system()). Exposer season+time_of_day au LLM context builder pour que les cartes refletent l'ambiance.

tasks.title: Typographie hybride: titre celtique + corps sans-serif
tasks.description: Director decision q-20260412-003: polices hybrides. Titre des cartes = police celtique (ex: Unciale Antiqua ou similaire). Corps du texte narratif = sans-serif moderne lisible. Configurer dans MerlinVisual: FONT_TITLE et FONT_BODY distincts. S'assurer que les deux polices sont dans res://fonts/.

tasks.title: Direction artistique N64/PS1: low-poly + pixelisation + effets volumetriques
tasks.description: Director decision q-20260412-004: esthetique ultra low-poly / low-pixel entre N64 et PS1 avec effets volumetriques coherents. Actions: (1) Activer pixel snap sur les meshes 3D, (2) Shader affine texture mapping (pas de correction perspective), (3) Shader fog/brouillard volumetrique low-fi, (4) Reduire la resolution de rendu (viewport scale), (5) Dithering pour les ombres. Documenter dans MerlinVisual les constantes RENDER_SCALE et PIXEL_SNAP_ENABLED.

tasks.title: Memoire narrative: RAG pour resume compresse story_log
tasks.description: Director decision q-20260413-001: utiliser le RAG pour un resume compresse (meilleure solution mais plus complexe). Actuellement story_log tronque a 2 entrees (store_run.gd:156). Implementation: (1) A chaque resolve_choice, appeler rag_manager.add_narrative_entry(card_text, chosen_label, cards_played). (2) build_llm_context() recupere un resume compresse (3-5 items) via rag_manager.get_narrative_summary(). (3) Story_log reste a 2 pour le contexte immediat, RAG fournit le contexte long-terme. Verifier que rag_manager.gd expose add_narrative_entry() et get_narrative_summary() ou les creer.
